action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Madison, Moore Omokunde, Bare, Palmeri, Clancy, Haywood, Arney, Brown, DeSmidt, Fitzgerald, Goodwin, Hysell, Kirsch, Mayadev, Miresse, Neubauer, Phelps, Prado, Roe, Sheehan, Sinicki, Snodgrass, Stubbs, Subeck, Taylor, Stroud, Tenorio and Vining; 
cosponsored by Senators Roys, Larson, Spreitzer, Smith, Habush Sinykin and Hesselbein
